about.title: About {siteName}
about.description: Learn more about our mission, our story, and the team behind the world's most comprehensive forex brokers directory.

story.title: Our Story
story.content: Founded in 2026, {siteName} was born out of a simple but powerful observation: the forex market is vast and ever-growing, yet finding reliable, transparent, and up-to-date information about brokers remains a genuine challenge for traders at every level. What started as a small community project a humble effort to list useful tools and resources for forex traders quickly evolved into something far greater. As traders from around the world began relying on our platform to discover, compare, and evaluate brokers, we realized the scale of the problem we were solving. Today, {siteName} is home to 480+ brokers, a growing network of industry sponsors, and thousands of traders who trust our platform every day to make smarter, more informed trading decisions.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: Our mission is simple: to empower traders with clarity. We believe that every trader whether a beginner or a seasoned professional deserves access to accurate, unbiased, and comprehensive data about the brokers they choose to trust with their capital. We are committed to:

list.transparency: Transparency – Clearly distinguishing between sponsored listings and organic results
list.accuracy: Accuracy – Regularly updating broker data including spreads, regulations, platforms, and minimum deposits
list.community: Community – Building a platform driven by real trader experiences and insights
list.accessibility: Accessibility – Making professional-grade broker research available to everyone, for free

offer.title: What We Offer
offer.content: {siteName} is more than just a directory. Our platform brings together everything a trader needs in one place:

list.listings: 480+ Broker Listings – One of the most comprehensive forex broker databases available
list.comparisons: Side-by-Side Comparisons – Compare spreads, regulations, platforms, and more
list.network: Sponsor & Partner Network – Connecting traders with trusted PSP partners, trading platforms, CRM providers, liquidity partners, and more
list.education: Forex Education & Training – Resources to help traders grow their knowledge
list.algorithmic: Algorithmic Trading Providers – Discover leading bot and algo trading solutions
list.updates: Regular Updates – Our team continuously monitors and refreshes listing data

list.customers: 200+ happy customers on our paid plans
list.subscribers: 5,000+ newsletter subscribers from the trading community
list.sponsorship: Transparent sponsorship – sponsored listings are always clearly labeled
list.guarantee: 30-day money-back guarantee on all paid plans
list.partners: Supported by leading industry partners across trading platforms, liquidity, payments, and CRM

part_of_it.title: Want to Be Part of It?
part_of_it.content: Whether you're a broker looking to reach thousands of traders, an industry partner seeking visibility, or a trader wanting to stay informed we have a place for you.

list.list: List your brokerage → Submit your broker
list.advertise: Advertise with us → Reach our professional audience
list.subscribe: Stay updated → Subscribe to our newsletter

piotr.name: Piotr Kulpinski
piotr.bio: A software developer and entrepreneur with over 15 years of experience building web applications. Passionate about creating tools that provide real value to the community.
